column44: Seemed the oil pressure was a bit too low and the engine was overheating. Midway through the drive the vehicle starting throwing codes and I had to pull over. The codes suddenly disappeared however and I drove more conservatively for the rest of the study to attempt to not overheat the engine again.

While driving on the road to foothills campus the speedometer, odometer, attackometer both stopped working and both dropped to zero. While this occurred all the lights on the center dashboard turned on, while the left panel remained the same. A few minutes passed by then everything went back to normal.

column44: When drive on Laporte past overland, a notification popped up as service advised. Then all of the dashboard lights lite up like a Christmas tree. I can’t recall all of them but one looked like it was about the truck bed. Another about pressure of some sort. And lastly a stethoscope. After a bit the truck returns to normal but still had service advised in the middle of the screen.
